projectDescription: A research project that predicts prime numbers using a multi-dimensional feature engineering approach and a two-stage ensemble of a Decision Tree filter and a Deep Neural Network (MLP).
keyFeatures: Multi-dimensional feature engineering converting numbers into arithmetic dimensions
Two-stage ensemble: Decision Tree base-system filter + Deep MLP intersection resolver
Base-6, Base-30, and Base-210 primorial last-digit dictatorships for composite elimination
Fractal remainder geometry detecting prime sanctuaries with +150% probability lift
Fermat witness flags (bases 2, 3, 5, 7) for cryptographic-grade pseudoprime detection
Cyclical modulos for infinite scale extrapolation beyond training range
100% precision (zero false positives) across all tested ranges up to 110,000
